title: OreUI for Java Edition
description: Using Minecraft Bedrock's OreUI in Minecraft Java Edition
body:
**OreUI for Java Edition** allows you to experience a modern user interface similar to Minecraft Bedrock Edition through a resource pack. Unlike the original OreUI, OreUI for Java Edition has applied the OreUI style to more interfaces, such as the inventory and workstations, ensuring a seamless and non-intrusive look.

**OreUI for Java Edition** mimics the user interface of Minecraft Bedrock Edition, making you feel as if you are playing Minecraft Bedrock. Different button states are all represented with corresponding OreUI styles, and even interfaces that MOJANG did not originally design have been given the OreUI treatment. Due to differences in UI logic between Minecraft Java Edition and Minecraft Bedrock Edition, I am unable to replicate 100% of OreUI's animation effects in Minecraft Java Edition.

Thank you for downloading, and we welcome your feedback. I will continue to improve it.
